# PHAssetCollectionSubtype.albumMyPhotoStream

**Case**

The user’s personal iCloud Photo Stream.

## Declaration

```swift
case albumMyPhotoStream
```

## Discussion

This album is available only if the user has enabled My Photo Stream in the iCloud settings for Photos. The My Photo Stream setting is off by default when iCloud Photo Library is enabled.

## Cloud Album Types

- **PHAssetCollectionSubtype.albumCloudShared**: An iCloud Shared Photo Stream.
title: PHAssetCollectionSubtype.albumMyPhotoStream
